# Office Hours vs Understanding Analysis 

## Introduction
In this analysis, we explored whether attending office hours is related to student understading in COMP 110. 

## Data and Methods 
We used survey data and filtered students based on office hour attendance. 

## Results 
Students who attended office more frequently tended to report higher understanding, although there was still overlap between groups. 

## Conclusion
This suggests that office hours may positively impact understanding, but other factors also play a role.
